title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Capesize Enters September on a High Note - Following one of the strongest Augusts in recent history for Capesize spot rates, early September appears equally promising for large bulk carriers.
